dashboard.title: Bot dashboard
backtest.title: Backtest
backtest.empty: Select exchange and pair, then run a fleet backtest across all TA strategies and timeframes.
backtest.retail_default: retail default — not your VIP tier
backtest.lookback_hint: Sub-minute timeframes use shorter lookbacks (same as bot charts). Compare rankings within a timeframe.
backtest.uniform_window_hint: All timeframes use the same 30-day window so rankings are apples-to-apples (1S may fetch ~2.6M bars).
backtest.tsl_auto_hint: Trailing stop is auto-optimized in pass 3 (0%, 2%, … 20%) for the final top 10 — not set before run.
backtest.empty_beats_bh: No strategies with positive P&L beat buy & hold in this run. Compare against the baseline row below.
backtest.history.title: Backtest history
backtest.history.empty: Completed fleet runs appear here. Click a run to reload its results.
backtest.optimized_legend: * Pass 2 tuned indicator parameters and/or pass 3 tuned trailing stop (TSL) for this row. Values used are in Settings — not necessarily different from catalog defaults if defaults already won.
backtest.optimized_mark_hint: Parameters and/or TSL were optimized in fleet pass 2–3

growth.title: Anonymous growth
bots.title: Multi-bot fleet
bots.limits.intro: {count} bots saved · {running}/{max} running ({mode}). You may store up to {total} bots; only running bots consume OHLCV + TA compute.
bots.limits.why: Limits keep charts, backtests, and signals responsive. Stopped bots do not count toward running caps.
bots.limits.near_total: You have {count} of {max} bots saved. Consider deleting unused bots so the dashboard stays fast.
bots.limits.near_enabled: {running} of {max} bots are running in {mode} mode. Each running bot fetches market data and recomputes TA every bar.
bots.limits.near_sub_minute: {running} of {max} sub-minute bots (1S–30S) are running. These timeframes use far more CPU than 1-minute bars.
bots.limits.at_1s_cap: Your 1-second bot slot is in use. At 1S the app recomputes TA on ~3,600 bars every second — only one can run reliably.
bots.limits.blocked_total: You reached the {max}-bot storage limit. Delete bots you no longer need. This keeps the app fast and avoids clutter.
bots.limits.blocked_enabled: You may run at most {max} bots at once in {mode} mode. Each running bot loads OHLCV data and runs TA on every new bar — pause another bot first.
bots.limits.blocked_sub_minute: You reached the {max}-bot cap for sub-minute timeframes (1S–30S). These bars trigger TA thousands of times per hour. Use 1-minute or higher, or pause a fast bot.
bots.limits.blocked_1s: Only {max} bot may run at the 1-second timeframe. At 1S, indicators are recomputed on ~3,600 OHLCV rows every second — a second 1S bot would stall charts and signals. Use 5S+ or pause the existing 1S bot.
bots.limits.play_blocked: Cannot start — limit would be exceeded
bots.limits.hint: {count} bots ({running} running). Limits: {total} total, {enabled} running at once, {subMin} sub-minute (1S–30S), {oneS} at 1-second.
bots.limits.why_btn_hint: Why these limits exist (not a paywall)
bots.limits.why_not_paywall: TrendAlgo is free and open source. These caps are technical guardrails — not a license tier, subscription, or paywall. Everyone gets the same limits.
bots.limits.why_p1: Each running bot loads live OHLCV candles and recomputes your chosen TA strategy on every new bar. Faster timeframes mean more bars per hour, so CPU and memory use grow quickly.
bots.limits.why_li_ohlcv: Market data is fetched and kept in memory for charts and signals.
bots.limits.why_li_ta: Identical bots share cached TA signals; new bars only recompute a short tail window instead of the full lookback.
bots.limits.why_li_subminute: Sub-minute bots (1S–30S) can trigger thousands of TA passes per hour — only a few may run at once.
bots.limits.why_li_1s: At 1-second bars the app maintains ~3,600 rows and recomputes TA every second; only one 1S bot may run reliably.
bots.limits.why_p2: Stopped bots do not count toward running caps. You can save many bot configs; limits only apply when bots are actively trading or paper-trading.
bots.limits.meter_saved_aria: {used} of {max} bots saved, {remaining} more can be created
bots.limits.meter_running_aria: {used} of {max} bots running, {remaining} more can run
bots.limits.meter_running_note: Cap applies in {mode} mode while bots are enabled.
bots.limits.meter_subminute_aria: {used} of {max} sub-minute bots running, {remaining} more can run
bots.limits.why_li_cache: OHLCV is cached in SQLite per bot pair/timeframe; TA signals are cached in memory when strategy and params match (network and CPU savings, not a paywall).
ohlcv.warmup.title: Downloading market candles
ohlcv.warmup.intro: Fetching OHLCV data for pairs and timeframes your bots use. Only bot pairs are cached — not the full exchange catalog. This speeds up charts and TA on the next bar.
ohlcv.warmup.done_intro: OHLCV cache is up to date for your bot fleet. Running bots will reuse stored candles and only download new bars.
ohlcv.warmup.error_intro: Could not finish downloading market data. Partial cache may still be usable.
bots.templates.sub_minute_warn: Sub-minute timeframes (1S–30S) are limited to a few running bots because each bar recomputes TA on thousands of OHLCV rows. At 1S only one bot may run at a time.
bots.field.label: Label
bots.equity.hint_pct: Enter 0–100% of total portfolio net worth in USD.
bots.glossary.title: Strategy glossary
bots.glossary.page_intro: Descriptions and formulas for 307 unified TA strategies on OHLCV data. Search by name, category, or keyword.
bots.glossary.search: Search by name, category, or keyword…
bots.detail.title: Bot
bots.detail.load_error: Could not load bot. Check that the API is running and try again.
bots.detail.paper_mode: Paper trading — local demo data (no bot detail API required).

export.disclaimer: Exports are for your records only — not tax or legal advice.
billing.title: License & fees
billing.payment_watching: Watching the blockchain for your payment…
billing.payment_expired: Payment window expired. Start a new payment.
billing.grace_banner: Grace period day {day} of 7 — {left} day(s) left to pay before live trading suspends
billing.suspended_banner: Live trading suspended — pay the license fee to unlock
billing.awaiting_first_profit: No license fees until your first profitable trade — then one free month before billing starts.
research.tools_intro: Optional analysis on your last single-strategy backtest or portfolio. Results appear in the JSON panel below.
research.walk_forward_hint: Splits trade history into train/test folds to see if strategy edge holds on unseen periods (reduces overfitting).
research.monte_carlo_hint: Randomly shuffles trade P&L order many times to estimate luck vs skill — shows a distribution of possible equity curves.
research.portfolio_mc_hint: Simulates portfolio drawdowns using your holdings' daily returns — stress-tests net worth under random market paths.
research.heatmap_hint: Grid of hyperparameter pairs vs backtest score from the built-in optimizer — find stable parameter regions.
research.diversification_empty: No suggestions yet — sync portfolio holdings to analyze allocation.
research.correlation_legend: Values near 1.0 move together; near 0 are less related. Row and column labels match each cell.
